message:
fix: Add bytes variant to ComptimeValue for proper PyBytes handling

Previously, bytes literals (b'...') were converted to strings during
comptime evaluation, losing their identity. This caused type mismatches
when assigning to hoisted global variables typed as PyBytes.

Changes:
- Add .bytes and .owned_bytes variants to ComptimeValue union
- Handle bytes in emitComptimeAssignment with bytesLiteral wrapper
- Add bytes handling to evalEq, toBool, and type conversion functions
- Properly escape non-printable characters in bytes output
